text: Explain spending pace at daily, weekly, and monthly intervals without hiding absent plans, missing actuals, Uncategorized Spend, or insufficient evidence. Evidence [direct]: the framed owner pain explicitly requires repeated daily, weekly, and monthly on-track interpretation and the BUDGET boundary excludes that interpretation.
target: Every requested interval and category is accounted for by an exact metric plus an explicit interpretable state, or by a named unavailable or insufficient-evidence state with no fabricated zero or confidence.
